reasoning: The control SC-22 focuses on architecture and provisioning for name/address resolution services, which is more about ensuring the resilience and protection of DNS and related services. In Kubernetes, DNS is typically managed by CoreDNS, a highly available DNS service running within the cluster. The specific checks mentioned (e.g., deletion protection, multi-AZ deployments) are cloud provider-specific features related to infrastructure resilience and do not directly map to Kubernetes security controls. Kubernetes does not natively provide deletion protection or multi-AZ deployment features for DNS services, as these are managed at the cloud infrastructure level.
title: Architecture and Provisioning for Name/address Resolution Service
